name: American Outdoor Brands, Inc.
business: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. designs, sources, and sells outdoor lifestyle products (including premium sportsman knives and tools for fishing and hunting, land management tools, products used while hunting, meat processing equipment, and outdoor cooking equipment) and shooting sports accessories (including rests, vaults, electro-optical devices, reloading supplies, and firearm cleaning supplies). It sells to consumers through e-commerce channels and traditional brick-and-mortar retail channels.

exposures.sentence: Our owned brands include BOG, BUBBA, Caldwell, Crimson Trace, Frankford Arsenal, Grilla, Hooyman, Imperial, LaserLyte, Lockdown, MEAT! Your Maker, Old Timer, Schrade, Tipton, Uncle Henry, and Wheeler, and we license additional brands for use in association with certain products we sell, including M&P, Smith & Wesson, and Performance Center by Smith & Wesson.
We distribute our products through e-commerce and traditional distribution channels.
Breaches of our information systems could adversely affect our reputation, disrupt our operations, and result in increased costs and loss of revenue.
We may not be successful in our artificial intelligence initiatives, which could adversely affect our business, reputation, or financial results.

catalysts.event: Board approved plan to divest ust branded product line
catalysts.sentence: On December 12, 2025, our Board of Directors approved a plan to divest our ust branded product line (the Disposal Group).

catalysts.event: Expect to complete divestiture within twelve months
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the divestiture within twelve months.
We expect to spend approximately $3.5 million to $4.0 million of capital expenditures in fiscal 2027.

tamClaims.claim: The outdoor cooking industry is estimated at $7 billion with approximately 92 million households.
tamClaims.sentence: our acquisition of Grilla in March 2022 provided entry into the estimated $7 billion outdoor cooking industry comprised of approximately 92 million outdoor cooking households.

tamClaims.claim: Outdoor recreation participant base grew to a record 181.1 million participants in calendar 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The outdoor recreation participant base grew by 3.0 percent in calendar 2024 to a record 181.1 million participants, representing 58.6 percent of the United States population ages six and older.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 57.9 million anglers over age six in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: the Outdoor Foundation and Recreational Boating & Fishing Foundation estimated there were approximately 57.9 million anglers over the age of six in the United States, including more than 43 million freshwater anglers and 15 million saltwater anglers.

tamClaims.claim: NSSF estimates 3.9 million new gun owners in 2024 alone.
tamClaims.sentence: In a 2025 study, the NSSF economic impact report estimates 3.9 million new gun owners in 2024 alone.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 15 million people participated in hunting activities in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: the Outdoor Industry Association estimated that approximately 15 million people participated in hunting activities in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Sport shooting participation increased to 63.5 million adults in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: the NSSF estimated that participation in sport shooting increased from 34 million adults in 2009 to 63.5 million adults in 2022.
